name: goliath/hiw-fix-warranty
title: How It Works – Fix & Warranty
description: Grey two-column section with split-colour H2s for Fix the Problem and Lifetime Warranty.

fixP.default: With Goliath™, you can fix the problem without stopping your business. No downtime or delays.

warrantyP1.default: Lifetime impact warranty: if your racking upright is damaged under normal warehouse conditions, we repair or replace it, no questions asked.

warrantyP2.default: Our product is a long-term solution that removes the risk of paying for repairs continuously.
